intent: add FAME multi-leg router, generated route artifacts, native WETH/Aerodrome V2 support, deploy validation, docs/todos

findings.title: Router source duplicates the public fee-recipient deployment constant outside config/fame-public.env
findings.violation: The diff adds `address public constant DEFAULT_FEE_RECIPIENT = 0xC952C53D8B63919e372caa2E6FEe605ee24E4D3D;` in router source, while the same public deployment value is already defined as `BASE_FAME_ROUTER_FEE_RECIPIENT` in `config/fame-public.env`.
findings.why_it_matters: This creates a second canonical location for a deployment-specific address. Even though the deploy script correctly reads `BASE_FAME_ROUTER_FEE_RECIPIENT`, the Solidity constant can drift from the public config or be treated by integrators as the authoritative launch value.
findings.suggested_fix: Remove the unused `DEFAULT_FEE_RECIPIENT` constant from `FameRouter` and keep the launch fee recipient exclusively in `config/fame-public.env` plus the deploy/validation scripts that read it.

residual_risks: Review was limited to AGENTS.md compliance over the current branch diff; it did not attempt to prove the operational correctness of the deployed router or generated route artifacts.
